---
name: Sprint Epic
about: Create a sprint-level epic that owns child issues
title: "[Sprint vX.Y][Epic] "
labels: "type:epic"
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the sprint-level outcome in 2-3 lines.

## Outcome

Describe the state that should be true when this sprint epic is complete.

## Sprint

Sprint vX.Y

## Scope

Included:
- Included item

Excluded:
- Out-of-scope item

## Child Issues

- [ ] Child issue 1
- [ ] Child issue 2

## Exit Criteria

- [ ] All P0 child issues are complete.
- [ ] Related PRs are merged or explicitly carried over.
- [ ] Test plan or validation notes are captured.
- [ ] Remaining follow-ups are split into separate issues.

## Notes

Add related PRs, OpenSpec changes, docs, or decisions.
